# Physical AI Party: Build Voice Agents with Agora ConvoAI — Agentic AI Build Week Workshop

[GenAI Fund - Official](https://luma.com/gaf?k=c)

Jul

9

Thursday, July 9

10:30 AM - 12:00 PM GMT+7

Register to See Address

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

Welcome! Please choose your desired ticket type:

Request to Join

You will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.

About Event

THE MOST INTERESTING AI APPLICATIONS AREN'T ON YOUR SCREEN.

They're in robots that respond to your voice. Devices that listen and react in real time. Customer service systems that interact with the physical world without a browser in sight.

The gap between "AI that generates text" and "AI that exists in the world" is where the next generation of builders is working. Physical AI Party: Agora ConvoAI World is where you go to join them.

* * *

## WHAT THIS IS

A 90-minute hands-on workshop at the AWS HCMC Office - part of Agentic AI Build Week - where you'll work directly with Agora's ConvoAI platform, real-time communication infrastructure, and the engineers who built it.

In 90 minutes, you will:

- Build and experiment with AI voice agents capable of real-time interaction - not a slideshow, a working prototype

- Learn how Physical AI combines speech, vision, and automation into systems that are world-aware, not just screen-aware

- Explore production use cases across robotics, smart devices, customer service automation, healthcare, and education

- Connect directly with developers and AI builders from across the ASEAN ecosystem

- Walk away with Agora developer resources, API access, credits, and eligibility for future community programs and hackathons

* * *

## WHO THIS IS FOR

This workshop is for you if:

- You're a developer, technical founder, or AI enthusiast building applications that go beyond text and browser interfaces

- You've experimented with voice AI, real-time communication, or multimodal agents and want to go deeper into the infrastructure layer

- You're building at AABW and want your project to interact with the physical world - not just a dashboard

This is NOT for you if you want another intro-level AI overview. This is for people who are actively building and want hands-on access to the tools and engineers making Physical AI real.

* * *

## YOUR SPEAKER

This session is led by Agora's Director of Customer Support Engineering ( [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dederek/?utm_source=luma)) \- one of the core technical voices behind Agora's ConvoAI ecosystem.

Agora powers real-time voice, video, and interactive AI infrastructure for applications used by millions worldwide. ConvoAI is their platform for bringing conversational intelligence beyond the screen - into devices, robots, and real-world experiences.

* * *

## THE CONTEXT

This session is part of [Agentic AI Build Week (Jul 8-12)](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) \- Southeast Asia's largest agentic AI hackathon, hosted at the AWS HCMC Office with 2,000+ builders, 30+ tech partners, and a $1M+ prize pool.

 **Main event registration required.** You must be registered for AABW first: [Register for AABW](https://bit.ly/AABWSKP?utm_source=luma)

* * *

## THE CATCH

Capacity is capped. Every application is reviewed.

Builders actively participating in AABW get priority. If you're shipping something real and want access to Agora's ConvoAI stack, apply below.

 **Apply below to claim your spot.**

Location

Please register to see the exact location of this event.

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

[View on Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=10.770818805328924%2C106.70322248972671)
